results.title: Brendan Sorsby's Agent Drops Bombshell Cincinnati Revelation After NFL Draft Decision
results.description: While much of the anger is directed towards Texas Tech in the wake of the Brendan Sorsby situation, the quarterback's agent points the finger somewhere else.

results.title: Milwaukee brews up a win over the Guardians in low-scoring series opener
Cal Raleigh delivers decisive hit in return from injured list as Mariners top Orioles 3-1
results.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Cal Raleigh hit a two-run single in his return from the injured list, Logan Gilbert struck out a season-high 10 in seven strong innings and the Seattle Mariners beat the Baltimore Orioles 3-1 on Tuesday night.

results.title: Jack Stewart & Tyler Herring face runoff for District #18
World Cup star issues retirement statement - 'I don’t see any more meaning in football'
results.description: A World Cup star has emotionally opened up on retiring from football at the tournament.

results.title: Following losses to Waukon and New Hampton, WarEagles sweep Postville
results.description: The Clayton Ridge/Central baseball team improved to 3-5 in Upper Iowa Conference play last week, following up losses to Waukon and New Hampton with a doubleheader sweep of Postville.
results.source: Courier Press - The Guttenberg Press - Times-regis

results.title: Aaron Boone reveals development that could change Yankees’ future outfield
results.description: Yankees' Aaron Boone got an unexpected answer when he asked Jasson Dominguez about right field.
